command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

JOB_ID='phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2'
RUN_ID='bg-20260623T210555Z-6099f8d1'
WS="memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/$RUN_ID"

echo '===S: LIVENESS HEARTBEAT FRESHNESS==='
NOW_EPOCH=$(date +%s)
HB_TS=$(python3 -c "
import json,datetime
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('$WS/heartbeat-liveness.json')
if p.is_file():
    d=json.loads(p.read_text())
    ts=d.get('ts','')
    dt=datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(ts.replace('Z','+00:00'))
    print(int(dt.timestamp()))
else:
    print(0)
")
echo "HB epoch: $HB_TS"
echo "Now epoch: $NOW_EPOCH"
python3 -c "
now = 
hb = $HB_TS
age = now - hb
print(f'Heartbeat age: {age}s')
lease = 300 + 60  # WORKER_LEASE_S + FROZEN_EXTRA_GRACE_S
if age > lease:
    print(f'STATUS: FROZEN (age {age}s > threshold {lease}s)')
else:
    print(f'STATUS: WITHIN LEASE (age {age}s < threshold {lease}s)')
"

echo '===T: WORKER PROC ELAPSED==='
START=$(stat -c %Y $WS/run-state.json 2>/dev/null)
NOW=$(date +%s)
python3 -c "print(f'Worker running for: { - }s')"

echo '===U: GITHUB STATUS (secretscan restriction)==='
git remote -v 2>/dev/null | grep -i github || echo 'no github remote configured'
git log --oneline --all | grep -c '' | xargs -I{} echo 'total commits in history: {}'

echo '===V: WAVE1 MODULE IMPORTABLE==='
python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.')
import runtime.moreno_wave1_reliability as w
import runtime.moreno_governed_executor as e
import runtime.moreno_operator_bridge as b
print('wave1_version:', w.WAVE1_VERSION)
print('has _run_bg_wave1:', hasattr(e, '_run_background_governed_phase_wave1'))
print('has build_wave1:', hasattr(e, 'build_executor_actions_wave1'))
print('bridge_import: OK')
print('all_imports: PASS')
"

ENDSSH
